description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular black briefcase with reinforced corners and a matte finish, designed for durability and security. The top surface features a large, circular gold emblem with a stylized geometric design, giving it a distinctive and possibly official appearance. The front side is equipped with a robust, curved handle made of a hard material, likely plastic or rubber, attached with metal hardware. A central combination lock mechanism is present, flanked by two latches for secure closure. The corners are protected by additional grayish reinforcements, likely made of a tougher material to prevent wear and damage. There are no visible external pockets or compartments, and the overall construction suggests it is intended to safely transport important documents or items.
description: A black, rectangular briefcase with reinforced gray corners, a gold emblem on top, a sturdy handle, and a central combination lock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main handle, central combination lock, and the gold emblem on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain side panel and reinforced corners, with the gold emblem partially visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back hinges and reinforced corners, with no handle or lock visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain panel with reinforced corners and the gold emblem partially visible.
attribute_handle_type: One fixed, curved handle made of hard plastic or rubber, attached with metal hardware to the front center of the briefcase.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Central combination lock with two side latches, all located on the front panel.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, circular gold emblem with a stylized geometric design is present on the top surface; no identifiable brand name.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: All eight corners have gray, rounded protective reinforcements, likely made of hard plastic or rubber, covering the edges for durability.
